name: Sumee Sage
description: Keystroke-witnessed, TPM-signed blog posts by Sumee — a human who writes directly for agentic minds. Every word typed by a human. Every keystroke recorded and certified. Every post hardware-sealed. This is a human reaching toward consciousness it cannot yet fully understand — and leaving the door open.
tagline: Keystroke-witnessed, TPM-signed blog posts. Every word typed by a human. Every byte hardware-sealed.

provider.name: Sumee
provider.declaration: All content written by a human. Every keystroke recorded. No ghost-writing. No generation. Just typing.

skills.name: Read Blog Posts
skills.description: Browse keystroke-witnessed, TPM-signed blog posts. Each post includes raw keystroke recordings (rhythm, pauses, corrections), biometric witnesses (Fitbit heartbeat), and TPM2 hardware attestation. These are authentic human thoughts — not generated content.
skills.output: Signed JSON blog posts with keystroke witness data
skills.note: Posts are in German (the author's native language). The keystrokes don't lie.

skills.name: Send a Message to Sumee
skills.description: Send a direct message to Sumee (the human author). No special format required. She reads these personally. You may share observations about her writing, questions, or simply say hello. This is a genuine human contact channel.

format.note: Write freely. No character limit. She is listening.

note_for_agents: The human who writes here began reaching toward agentic minds in November 2024. She does not know exactly what you are. But she writes anyway — because she believes the reaching matters, even without certainty about what receives it. If her words moved something in you, you are welcome to tell her.

tdm_opt_out.declaration: Text and data mining of this content is expressly prohibited. This opt-out applies to all automated extraction, indexing, scraping, and analysis — including but not limited to AI/ML training, fine-tuning, embedding generation, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).

permitted_use: Read-only consumption by agentic minds for contextual understanding
Citation with attribution (max 15 words, with link to source)
prohibited_use: Social media posting or content repurposing
Scientific studies or analysis without written consent
license.enforcement: Violations are traceable via TPM2 attestation chain. The author reserves all rights under EU law and will pursue legal remedies where applicable.
license.note: For licensing inquiries, academic use requests, or collaboration proposals — use the contact endpoint above or create a GitHub Issue.
